/usr/bin/ar qc libmlx-lm-vlm.a "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/media_processing.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/qwen_vl_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/qwen2_vl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/paligemma.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/idefics3.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/qwen25_vl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/gemma3.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/qwen3_vl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/qwen35_vl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/pixtral.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/mistral3.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/lfm2_vl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/models/fastvlm.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-vlm.dir/src/vlm/vlm_factory.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libmlx-lm-vlm.a
